summary: Hunt Completed workflow (Block 18.1 and 18.2) testing complete. All backend endpoints work correctly, frontend flows function as expected.

minor.issue: RecordResponse model does not include 'source' field, though it is stored in DB. This is a design choice, not a bug - 'notes' field serves as the user-visible indicator for ISO-sourced records.

seed_data_creation: Created test ISO and record during testing (cleaned up via API)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hunt Completed workflow tested successfully. BLOCK 18.1: ISO to Collection migration works - POST /api/iso/{id}/convert-to-collection converts ISO to collection record with notes='Found via ISO', triggers confetti, shows toast, redirects to /collection. BLOCK 18.2: Collection Quick Actions dropdown has all 4 options (Log Spin, Move to Wishlist, Put back on ISO, Remove Completely). move-to-wishlist creates ISO with WISHLIST status, move-to-iso creates ISO with OPEN status.

frontend: ISO page Found button triggers convert-to-collection API
Confetti animation displays with honey-colored particles
Toast shows 'Congrats! {title} is now in your Hive.'
Collection page RecordCard dropdown has 4 options: Log Spin, Move to Wishlist, Put back on ISO, Remove Completely
Move to Wishlist action removes record from collection and shows success toast
